programme.title: Gold Rush: Frenemies
programme.desc: Parker brokers a deal with Tony to open a new cut on the Indian River. Tony's new trommel build gets derailed when a fire breaks out. Fred's greenhorn crew steps up to keep the Colonel running and on the gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Resurrecting Monsters
programme.desc: Parker cleans out the gold-rich Promiseland and risks losing Sluicifer during a move to new ground. The Beets try to supercharge their season with Tony's massive new trommel. Rick turns back to Monster Red in hopes of a record season.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Got Your Six
programme.desc: Tony cleans up big with the old timer's lost gold. On the brink of ending his season, Fred Lewis' team begins to crack, forcing him to make a big a decision. Rick cashes in his gold to fund his season, leaving his crew to keep the season on track.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Freddy to the Rescue
programme.desc: Parker's crew tallies up all the gold from the Last Cut and rushes to mine out the Airstrip Cut. Freddy and Juan answer an SOS call from Fred Lewis. Tony drains a massive holding pond to get his operation back up and running.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Viking Detective
programme.desc: Parker and crew face a potentially catastrophic flood at the Airstrip Cut. Tony uncovers a secret patch of gold-rich ground at Paradise Hill and logs his biggest gold weigh of the year. Rick throttles up his operation with a new water system.

programme.title: Gold Rush: No Questions Asked

programme.title: Gold Rush: Growing Pains

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Supersized: Irene's Journey

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Lindsey's Story

programme.desc: When the Chrisleys take a road trip to Nashville to tour a college campus, Todd is excited for the additional family bonding time. Savannah tries to gain independence and go out with new friends, but Todd goes to the extreme and crashes her big night out.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Nurse Todd
programme.desc: Todd is hurt when he offers help to all his kids but no one needs it, until Savannah is hit with appendicitis.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: College Bootcamp
programme.desc: When Chase pays a stranger to change his flat tire, Todd and Julie realize that they have sheltered their kids, and only have a few months left to teach them the basics of life.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: When Todd learns that Savannah has a new boyfriend, who she's intentionally keeping away from meeting her nosy family, Todd goes to extreme lengths to try to get a glimpse of this new guy, and doesn't like what he sees.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Failure to Launch
programme.desc: Julie is excited to start her new food blog but when no one 'likes' her page, she and Todd go on a food journey, which takes them from fine French cuisine to foraging for their own food.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Mid-life Chrisley
programme.desc: With Todd's birthday fast approaching, he begins to obsess about his age and reject getting older, but with the help of Mama Faye and her friends, he begins to accept the future.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Rules are Meant to be Broken
programme.desc: 'Chopped' host Ted Allen and comedian Margaret Cho don't play by the rules when it comes to taking down Bobby Flay. To do their dirty work, they've brought in renegade chefs Diane DiMeo and Ian Russo to put culinary golden boy Bobby in his place.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Bobby-Bing Bobby-Boom!
programme.desc: Bobby will have his work cut out for him against two tough Italian chefs and he'll get no sympathy from "Kitchen Cousins" Anthony Carrino and John Colaneri or from Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli. It's time to see if Bobby has what it takes to be on top.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Battle of Brooklyn
programme.desc: In the battle of Brooklyn's finest, young buck Jordan Andino and industry pro Jennifer Cole-Ruiz duke it out for the chance to get in the ring with Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Roll With the Punches
programme.desc: West coast boys Cutthroat Kitchen judge Simon Majumdar and chef Curtis Stone are here to take down the king of the east coast. They've brought in chefs Perry Cheung and Richard Mancini with one goal in mind: to knock out Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Boil and Trouble
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis and Daphne Oz cast spells to beat Bobby Flay and Jeffrey Hansell and Meghann Ward try to scare Bobby in his own kitchen.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Frenemies
programme.desc: Michael Symon and Debi Mazar, two of Bobby Flay's closest friends, stop by for a visit, but their intentions aren't all good.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: You Made Your Bread, Now Eat It
programme.desc: Acclaimed chef Michael Voltaggio and TV host Jaymee Sire pair up to topple Bobby Flay. They bring in Yehuda Sichel and Remy Pettus, two young and hungry chefs hot on the path to take down the culinary king.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: The Queen Returns
programme.desc: Culinary queen Martha Stewart returns with Iron Chef Michael Symon to defeat Bobby Flay. They bring in two young guns, brunch queen Sarah Wade and sous chef Max Castro, to see if Bobby can keep up with the future food generation.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Friends in Need
programme.desc: Robert Irvine arrives at Dunbar's Creole Cuisine in New Orleans to find a restaurant full of history but in dire need of his help. The livelihood of two families depends on its success, but the matriarch refuses to change.

programme.title: Dinner: Impossible: Ghost Town Gourmet
programme.desc: Robert Irvine's mission brings him to an abandoned mining town in Cerro Gordo, CA. His challenge is to prepare a meal for Amy Bruni and Adam Berry of 'Kindred Spirits,' using the same ingredients and equipment as miners in the region had in 1865.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Siblings Matt and Lisa Storch take their rivalry to the next level when they challenge each other for a chance to try and torch Bobby Flay. Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli and Damaris Phillips are there to cheer them on to victory.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Che-Sing Glory
programme.desc: Saturday Night Live's Michael Che and Geoffrey Zakarian from the Food Network are hoping to see their competitor's win against Bobby Flay as they bring out the Columbian flair along with some Asian fusion. Chef Andres Dangond and Tony Nguyen compete.

programme.desc: The Girls Night Out team decides to stay in and have a sleepover party, but Blackfire's threats descend on the city and the girls must put aside their fun to stop her.

programme.desc: When the T-Car is destroyed during a fight, the Titans go to a used car lot to get a new one.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!: TV Knight 4

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Choices

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Ollie
programme.desc: When Darwin asks Gumball to teach him how to skate, Gumball makes sure he covers every aspect of the skating lifestyle from wearing the right gear, using the right terms and choosing the right board.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Code
programme.desc: When Mr. Small shows a health and safety video in class, Darwin becomes obsessed with the idea of keeping the Wattersons safe.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Catfish
programme.desc: Grandpa Louie has no friends on Elmore Plus, so Gumball and Darwin, feeling bad, create one called Muriel. Granny Jojo finds out that Louie has been spending time online with 'another woman' and sets out to destroy her, despite her not being real.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Test
programme.desc: Gumball is livid when an online test keeps telling him that his character-type is 'The Loser.' He’s convinced the only way to shake off this label is to do the opposite of everything he normally would.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Sorcerer
programme.desc: Gumball can't accept that he's the only student without special powers. He becomes Hector’s mom's apprentice and she quickly learns that it's not wise to leave Gumball unsupervised around magic.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Slide
programme.desc: Gumball and Darwin help Rocky find love on a dating app.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Cycle
programme.desc: Gumball, Darwin and Anais find out that Mr. Wilson has been bullying their dad most of his life. The kids try to help their dad and ultimately seek revenge against Mr. Wilson.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Loophole
programme.desc: When Gumball and Darwin give Bobert instructions on how to behave properly, Bobert applies his own logic to the rules.

programme.title: The Amazing World of Gumball: The Outside

programme.desc: Musician Curtis Roach and his mother call on Nicole Curtis to show them the rehab ropes after they step in to save his grandmother's dilapidated duplex from demolition.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Rescue: Tudor Kitchen Complications
programme.desc: A Detroit couple calls on Nicole Curtis to help remodel the odd kitchen layout in their old Tudor home when renovation challenges back them into a heavily carpeted corner.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Rescue: Little Trouble in Big Craftsman
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis swoops in to rescue an engaged couple who find themselves in over their heads while they try to repair their water-damaged Craftsman home and plan their wedding at the same time.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Honeymooning and House Hunting
programme.desc: Newlyweds, busy professionals, and animal lovers, Sophie, Tim, and their two dogs are determined to get out of his cramped condo.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Country Chic for a New Generation
programme.desc: After more than 30 years in their rented farmhouse, a couple is on the hunt for a rural retirement home of their own with plenty of space to entertain family and friends.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Modern Masterpiece for Two
programme.desc: Engaged and homeless, Andrew and Phil are couch-surfing their way around the city while dreaming of a sprawling downtown home of their own.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Making Momma Happy
programme.desc: A suburban family is eager to cut down their commute and move into a home in central Nashville. Drew learns that when momma's happy, everyone's happy, and is surprised when the search leads to familiar grounds.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Glitz and Glamour
programme.desc: A Minneapolis couple relocates to Las Vegas in search of a mid-century modern gem. One of the men has a drag queen ultra-ego. A famous drag queen offers design tips for the 'drag room.' Jonathan works his magic and brings the bling.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Tight Transformation
programme.desc: A couple with twin toddlers is eager to relocate, but their whirlwind of a house hunt has left them exhausted and discouraged.

programme.title: House Hunters: Year-round Christmas in Chicago

programme.title: House Hunters: Pushy in Sarasota

programme.title: House Hunters: Fixer Fright in San Diego
programme.desc: A San Diego couple with three kids is looking for a home with more space. She wants to save money with a fixer-upper, but all he sees is work and prefers a kick-back property near the beach.

programme.title: House Hunters: Looking for the American Dream
programme.desc: A Canadian couple is looking to make their move to the U.S. permanent with a home purchase, but her American Dream is a big, two-story with neighbors and, for him, it's a Ranch home with lots of land.

programme.title: House Hunters: Journaling for a Home in West Palm Beach

programme.title: House Hunters: Two Days to Buy in Ohio
programme.desc: A newlywed couple moves to Ohio for a job opportunity, and they only have one weekend to find a house. He prefers a farmhouse with plenty of land, but she's more particular and wants a home in a neighborhood, with all the bedrooms upstairs.

programme.title: House Hunters: Mother Knows Best in Kentucky

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: My Fair Piggy
programme.desc: The Isabella County Fair is just around the corner, which means Dr. Pol, Dr. Emily and Dr. Brenda are busy treating fair animals, making sure they are in tiptop shape for competition.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Dr. Strangeglove
programme.desc: The staff of Pol Vet Services has one head scratcher after another, from the peculiar to the downright bizarre. With over 19,000 clients, it's only a matter of time before the vets are presented with a unique case that they've never seen before.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Cowhide and Seek
programme.desc: Runaways, adventurists, and escape artists, the Pol's have their hands full, between bulls on the loose, and an attempted kitten getaway.

programme.title: Dr. K's Exotic Animal ER: Eye-Eye-Ay!
programme.desc: A lemur, a rabbit, and a koi fish come to the clinic.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Flights of Horror
programme.desc: Across America run-ins between planes and UFO's are reported, sometimes with terrifying and tragic consequences. Find out if there is danger in our skies and if the government is covering up the truth behind these encounters.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Volcano NYC
programme.desc: A massive plume of smoke suddenly erupts from the ground in Manhattan, and experts investigate if this terrifying event is evidence of a volcano waking up beneath the streets of New York City and if it's almost due to blow.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Witch
programme.desc: When something strange is recorded flying in Mexico, some wonder if it's a witch reputed to kidnap children, and others believe it's evidence of a new way to smuggle drugs or a top-secret technology.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Door to the Undead
programme.desc: Security guards patrolling the basement of an empty municipal building are shocked when they encounter a door repeatedly opening and violently slamming shut; experts investigate a connection to black magic rituals and the building's disturbing past.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Exorcist Effect
programme.desc: A boy who can twist his head 180 degrees and face directly behind him resembles infamous accounts of demonic possession from horror films; experts use cutting-edge technology to find out what's giving him this extreme ability.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Epstein's Forbidden Temple
programme.desc: A building on an island owned by Jeffrey Epstein points to something sinister. Experts use cutting-edge technology to investigate why it was built and what goes on here.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost City of Goliath
programme.desc: A lost city near Jerusalem might have been the home of Goliath. Bizarre underwater formations might point to a top-secret US weapons testing facility. A strange sighting in the Arctic could be a lost Nazi relic or the icy remains of prehistoric monsters.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Exorcist Effect
programme.desc: A boy who can twist his head 180 degrees and face directly behind him resembles infamous accounts of demonic possession from horror films; experts use cutting-edge technology to find out what's giving him this extreme ability.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Epstein's Forbidden Temple
programme.desc: A building on an island owned by Jeffrey Epstein points to something sinister. Experts use cutting-edge technology to investigate why it was built and what goes on here.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost City of Goliath
programme.desc: A lost city near Jerusalem might have been the home of Goliath. Bizarre underwater formations might point to a top-secret US weapons testing facility. A strange sighting in the Arctic could be a lost Nazi relic or the icy remains of prehistoric monsters.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Door to the Undead
programme.desc: Security guards patrolling the basement of an empty municipal building are shocked when they encounter a door repeatedly opening and violently slamming shut; experts investigate a connection to black magic rituals and the building's disturbing past.

programme.title: Houdini's Last Secrets: The Torture Escape
programme.desc: No one knows how Harry Houdini pulled off his death-defying escapes, but now, a team of experts investigate his water torture illusion to reveal the secrets of this mysterious feat. What they uncover suggests Houdini might have led a double life as a spy.

programme.title: Houdini's Last Secrets: To Catch a Bullet
programme.desc: A team of experts re-create one of the deadliest tricks in magic history to uncover how Houdini could have pulled off the feat that killed many of his peers.

programme.title: Houdini's Last Secrets: Siberian Prison Conspiracy
programme.desc: One of Houdini's greatest escapes might have been a deep-cover conspiracy to spy for the American government and experts recreate his break from a Siberian prison transport to investigate the mysteries behind this incredible feat.

programme.title: Houdini's Last Secrets: Buried Alive
programme.desc: Houdini's mysterious sudden death might not have been an accident, and experts recreate his buried alive escape to reveal how this deadly feat was performed and if the great magician was killed by forces far more insidious.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Fighting Fire with Fire
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet the expert firefighters who use cutting-edge explosive technology to battle dangerous infernos, and using the latest science, they'll find if the best antidote to fire is more fire.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Blowing Up Hollywood
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy go behind-the-scenes at a premier Hollywood special effects company to reveal the secrets of the world's greatest movie explosions and how cutting-edge tech pushes cinematic carnage to new heights.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Black Powder Blast
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet experts of the battlefield who recreate black powder blasts from the Civil War, and using cutting-edge technology, they experiment with this simple yet deadly explosive.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: Fireworks Declassified
programme.desc: Go behind-the-scenes at one of the world's largest fireworks companies, and reveal the explosive secrets and cutting-edge innovations of its world-class pyrotechnics experts.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: FBI Bomb Squad
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet experts from the FBI's bomb squad to reveal the cutting-edge forensics and technology required to investigate deadly bomb threats and neutralize them.

programme.title: The Explosion Show: When Mountains Explode
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet experts using cutting-edge explosives to turn entire mountains into gravel-sized bits essential for construction, and their investigation reveals the high-powered, hi-tech process behind this dangerous work.

programme.title: MythBusters: Tanker Crush
programme.desc: In their farewell season Adam and Jamie take on their biggest ever experiment ever in an attempt to crush a giant tanker train car by creating a vacuum.

programme.title: MythBusters: Duct Tape Hour 2
programme.desc: In this second duct tape hour, Adam and Jamie set up a challenge that will test duct tape's strength, adhesion and load-bearing capability to the limit. Meanwhile Kari, Grant and Tori bust a duct tape automotive myth.

programme.title: MythBusters: Duct Tape: The Return
programme.desc: The MythBusters build a trebuchet and attempt to save Buster's life with their favorite mechanical cure all: Duct Tape.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Danger Travels
programme.desc: A retail store employee's crush on manager Antoinette Venditti Bruce escalates into an obsession after he's fired for inappropriate behavior. When she is transferred out of state for work, the stalker tracks her down to carry out his twisted plans.

programme.title: Betrayed: Prescription for Murder
programme.desc: After Marilyn Reza, a church-going mother of two is found dead in her home, investigators turn their attention to the members of her local church. However, a secret confession at her funeral brings the true murderer to light.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Twisted Desires
programme.desc: Every murder is a tragedy but some are plain barbaric.

programme.title: Diabolical: Someone's Lying
programme.desc: On April 17, 2015, a Virginia hunter stumbles upon a grisly discovery in the woods: a woman with an execution style gun shot wound to the back of her head. As detectives begin their investigation, they uncover a twisted web of lies and crimes.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Bodies in the Bunker
programme.desc: When 16-year-old aspiring film producer Bohdi Potter and her boyfriend go missing, the grave truth behind their disappearance lies deep in the hollow corridors and dark caverns of an old, abandoned military bunker.

programme.title: Death at the Truck Stop
programme.desc: Despite security camera footage and a police report that says otherwise, the death of a young woman at a truck stop is no accident, and a journalist makes it his mission to prove it.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: Tom and Jill Estes' bodies are found behind a dumpster in Festus, Missouri. Police are baffled, until a receipt leads to CCTV of a blood-stained suspect. A trail of bodies reveals a killer who must be stopped - before he strikes again.

programme.title: Dead Silent: His Blue Light
programme.desc: In the mid-to-late 1990s, a sexual predator police dub 'The Blue Light Rapist' goes on a serial attack spree across Arkansas. As authorities scramble to stop him in his tracks, he sets his sights on seventeen-year-old Shannon Woods.

programme.title: Death at the Truck Stop
programme.desc: Despite security camera footage and a police report that says otherwise, the death of a young woman at a truck stop is no accident, and a journalist makes it his mission to prove it.

programme.title: See No Evil: Happy Birthday to Drew
programme.desc: On March 27, 2017, Andrew Nesbitt is found dead on his 46th birthday in his Madison, Wisconsin apartment. With no witnesses, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in local bars, cabs, and street corners to track down his killer.

programme.title: Diabolical: Killer Track Record
programme.desc: Three women die of the same mysterious illness, the hunt is on to prove their deaths are no accident. Investigators don't know that they are being played for fools by a sinister killer lurking undetected. There's only one woman who can bring him down.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning: A Killer Unveiled
programme.desc: September 9, 2002. Husband and father, Tom Bragg, is found brutally murdered. A kind and well-liked man, his community struggles to think who wanted him dead. But when police take a closer look at his life and relationships, a deadly picture emerges.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning: Hidden in Plain Sight
programme.desc: When 23-year-old Whitney Bennett goes missing, her disappearance is a mystery. No-one understands why this popular young woman would leave her home or children. After a 4 month search, police find her body, and a chilling story of murder is revealed.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: What Happened to Abby?
programme.desc: A teen vanishes on her way home from school. Weeks later a puzzling letter from her arrives in the mail. This is the story of a desperate search for a girl hidden in plain sight, and her tale of bravery and resilience in the face of terror.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: The Bad Old Days
programme.desc: The city of Chicago is gripped with terror after three bizarre and savage murders go unsolved. Amidst this public furor, both the police and the local newspapers are desperate to give the people what they want: someone to blame.

programme.title: A Crime to Remember: Guess Who?
programme.desc: Los Angeles, CA, 1922: When a husband is found dead and his wife discovered locked in a closet, detectives find themselves lost in a world of seduction and obsession where the ghosts are all too real.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential: Scientology's Vanished Queen
programme.desc: The wife of the Church of Scientology's leader goes missing.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential: Silicon Valley Murder Mystery
programme.desc: A mysterious kingpin emerges from the shadows of the dark net willing to stop at nothing to protect his multi-billion-dollar online empire Silk Road.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Out of Control
programme.desc: A drunk passenger grabs the wheel from an Uber driver's hands, creating a potentially deadly scene on a highway. And then, a group of friends on a fishing excursion find themselves in terrifying peril when a speeding boat plows right into them.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Watch Dogs
programme.desc: After getting an alert on his computer, a man races home to confront two men burglarizing his home. Then, a woman and her child are defenseless when a strange man enters their home until their 122-pound Great Dane springs into action.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Hate Kills
programme.desc: A rumored hate crime disproven; a seasoned criminal gets a second chance; a defendant shouts an eerie message; a woman accused of attempted murder screams at a judge; and a man shoves a deputy then bolts.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Stolen Dreams
programme.desc: A young woman is found savagely murdered in her new home. Will the trail of clues police discovered lead them to her killer?

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Desert Drifter
programme.desc: Three teenage boys looking for adventure in the peaceful and secluded high desert of California's Indian Creek run into a drifter with a mission to kill.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder: Crime Writer
programme.desc: Brook Baker, a college journalism major, dreamt of becoming an investigative reporter. When the popular co-ed is brutally murdered while researching a controversial article, the police must sort through hundreds of suspects to find her killer.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Jehovah Jinx
programme.desc: Jehovah's Witness Pam Candelario is murdered during a home invasion and her husband Ralph is brutally beaten. But what appears to be a home invasion soon turns into one of the most bizarre murder cases that police have ever encountered.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Adolf Hitler
programme.desc: On June 22, 1941, Adolf Hitler launches the largest military offensive in history against the Soviet Union: Operation Barbarossa. Blinded by his fire power, Hitler signs his death sentence.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis

programme.desc: Four different stories that of events that happened against all odds.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Heroes
programme.desc: Four stories of heroism; A golden statue for Marines shooting a battle; The medal of honor for a daring train robbery; A General's plans that led the U.S. into WWII; and a piece of paper that spells death for Bonnie and Clyde.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Behind Enemy Lines
programme.desc: Four stories Behind Enemy Lines; goggles that shed light on the final mission of WWII; court documents detail a killer's last stand; a pistol signifies bravery for covert ops in Vietnam; a baseball signed by a ballplayer who became much more.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Great Escapes
programme.desc: Four stories highlighting great escapes; a monocular that helped save a stranded pilot; the rifle that helped a WWII hero cheat death; the hand-drawn map used to destroy SAM sites; and a Saint's medal that served as one scout pilot's lucky charm.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Movies That Shaped America's Myth
programme.desc: Celebrating the icons and legends of the American West as immortalized by Hollywood. From the great stars like Clint Eastwood, John Wayne, and Steve McQueen, to the great directors like John Ford, Sergio Leone, and Sam Peckinpah.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Hollywood vs. History
programme.desc: The story of the Old West as it was and as it was portrayed by the giants of cinema. Legendary lawmen like Wyatt Earp and 'Wild Bill' Hickok, infamous outlaws like Jesse James and Billy the Kid, and epic showdowns like the Gunfight at the OK Corral.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Saluting the Truth
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we reveal the startling truth of two legendary generals, George Patton and Ulysses S. Grant. You'll also get a reality check on the roaring twenties and lawless thirties.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The Inventors
programme.desc: We don't always know the truth behind the inventors that create the devices we use every day. On America's Facts vs. Fictions, learn that Thomas Edison didn't actually invent the light bulb and Benjamin Franklin never "discovered" electricity.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Flying Machines
programme.desc: Man created flying devices in order to travel the world and fly into space. Learn about Apollo 11 and how it came home with the help of a pen and about Air Force One, which is not a machine, but a code name.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Combat Shotguns
programme.desc: Deadly at close quarters the combat shotgun is a powerful tool of any army. Host Wil Willis fires history's greatest shotguns, from the Blunderbuss to the modern Benelli M4 and Mossburg 590.

programme.title: Combat Tech: Bombers
programme.desc: Go inside the most dominant and lethal military aircraft, from the bombers that won the War to the B-52, from the stealth B-2 to the most advanced and top secret bombers of the future.

programme.title: Combat Tech: Armor
programme.desc: An in-depth, action-packed look at the most advanced armor technologies, from body armor to heavy duty composites that make the Abrams tank the best protected and the most lethal vehicle on the modern battlefield.

programme.title: Combat Tech: ROVs
programme.desc: Go inside the robotic warriors and unmanned war machines that are taking their place on the front lines and spearheading a revolution on the modern battlefield.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Small Plates, Big Taste

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Sitka
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the cuisine of Sitka, Alaska, where the preparation of iconic Alaskan staples like king salmon, venison and rockfish has evolved with finesse.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cape Town
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern leaves no meal unexplored in multicultural Cape Town, South Africa, where meat comes in all forms, from sausage to stew to pie. The coastal city's seafood is out of this world, and the favorite pastry is nothing without a coat of syrup!

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mauritius

programme.desc: Andrew reveals the iconic eats of Asheville, North Carolina. The eclectic food city features tangy barbecue, decadent sweet potato pie, mouth-watering fried chicken, succulent rainbow trout and giant soft-dough biscuits with savory gravy.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Washington, D.C.

programme.desc: In Boston, Andrew sets out to prove that a city steeped in American history can also be a breeding ground for new, exciting food trends. Andrew finds that American ingenuity and independence are front-row center in this tour through Boston.

programme.desc: Two stepbrothers build various objects with materials found around their home.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper
programme.desc: When Stan throws a big weekend party to promote the Mystery Shack, Dipper uses an off-kilter copy machine to make clones of himself so he can impress Wendy. Meanwhile, Mabel stands up for her friends and fights for the Party Queen title in their honour.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Shoes/ Feud Fight
programme.desc: When Cricket gets sick, his family steps in to fulfill his commitments for the day. Chip Whistler shows up at the farmers’ market in an attempt to steal business.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Valentine's Dance/ Green Streets
programme.desc: At the Valentine’s Dance, Cricket develops an unwanted crush on Gabriella.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hurty Tooth / Sleepover Sisters
programme.desc: The Greens go on a family visit to the dentist's office where Cricket is determined to avoid Dr. Enamel and power through his toothache.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Uncaged
programme.desc: Cricket and Tilly’s rebellious mother Nancy Green is fresh out of jail and setting up shop in the city.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Clean... to the Extreme/ Stand and Delivery
programme.desc: Kick accidentally breaks Gunther's dad's foosball table and must complete a series of favours to replace it before Gunther's dad gets home. Kick takes over the delivery services at Battlesnax and must defend delivery guarantee.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Bad Car-Ma/ Goodbye, Gully
programme.desc: Gordie tries to impress his father, Mr. Gibble, by threatening to destroy Kick and Gunther's favorite hangout, The Gully.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Stumped Again/ The Kick Stays in the Picture
programme.desc: Kick must choose between helping his idol Billy Stumps in a monster truck show and helping his best friend Gunther with an important Viking coming-of-age ritual. Kick teams up with Jackie to take a photo for a billboard contest.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Meathead Justice/ Bwar-Mart
programme.desc: After Kick saves the DiPazzi twins' lives, they become indebted to him by their code of ethics. When they do not leave his side, he must go to extreme measures to get them out of his life.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Obsession: For Kick/ Flush and Release
programme.desc: Gunther tries to convince Kick that a girl named Jackie is becoming more than his biggest fan. Kick learns about a legendary giant goldfish roaming the waters of the flood Gully.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Kickin' Genes/ Clothes Call
programme.desc: When Kick finds out that his mom used to race speedboats, he asks for her help with an upcoming stunt. Kick promises to behave when his Mom drags him on an embarrassing shopping trip to the mall.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Sleepy River Wild/ Power Play
programme.desc: Gunther falls asleep on a waterpark ride/ Kick tries to get out of playing Romeo.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Abandon Friendship!/ Braking the Grade
programme.desc: When Kick and Gunther's parents have a fight, the boys fear their friendship is over and go out to find new friends. Then, fearing he's bound to get bad grades, Kick does everything he can to keep his report card from his dad.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Attic-a/ Free Gunther
programme.desc: Trapped in the attic overnight, the Buttowski men must ban together to survive.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Knocked Out/ Not Without My Cereal
programme.desc: Gunther gets in the way of Kick's stunt career/ Kick must look after his sister.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Dad's Car/ The Treasure of Dead Man Dave
programme.desc: Kick is about to be blamed for scratching Dad's car; Kick has to give an oral report.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Sister Pact/ Shh!
programme.desc: Kick makes a promise to Brianna to help her get in a prestigious girls club.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Rising Frienship! Master Dragon!
Phineas and Ferb: Run, Candace, Run/ Last Train to Bustville
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb's newest invention is a pair of boots that make the wearer extraordinarily fast. Candace decides to borrow them so she can be in two places at once. Then, the kids decide to create and race a giant hot air balloon at their grandparents.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Rollercoaster/ Candace Loses Her Head
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb decide to beat boredom by building the best roller coaster ever in their backyard, and Candace's birthday present is to get her face carved into the side of Mount Rushmore.

programme.desc: After being happily married, Heaven is ready to settle back into her hometown. Based on the novel by V.C. Andrews, Fallen Hearts.

programme.desc: Whisked off to Farthinggale Manor by Tony Tatterton, Annie pines for her lost family, especially for her half-brother Luke. Annie discovers a hidden cottage in the woods, and the mystery of her past deepens.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Paintball
programme.desc: In 1962, the people of the small town of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15 year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered. It would take 24 years to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign Here
programme.desc: A young woman walked out of a department store, got into a rental car, and was never seen again. The signature on the rental car agreement turned out to be a forgery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Promises
programme.desc: A tape recorded by a popular gym teacher before his own death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Time Will Tell
programme.desc: A Canadian financier assumes the name of a co-worker as part of a money-laundering scheme. The man turns up dead in the ocean, with an anchor tied around his torso.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death Play
programme.desc: Marie Robard's character in her high school's play 'Hamlet' hinted at her own inner turmoil.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Dot Com
programme.desc: When a federal agency rules that a fire was intentionally set, the mother of the child killed in the suspicious fire was charged with murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: Police determine that the human remains found in a discarded box belong to one Edna Posey. But to find out whether the man accused of the crime is guilty, investigators turn to insects and the forensic entomologist who can interpret their behavior.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Touching Recollection
programme.desc: An eighteen-year-old girl is abducted at gunpoint from her home in Jackson, Ohio. Fortunately the victim returns hours later, and police hope the tire impressions and shoe prints at the crime scene will enable them to find the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bitter Pill to Swallow
programme.desc: A pregnant woman experiences severe morning sickness and suspects something is amiss.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sip of Sins
programme.desc: Faryion Wardrip seemed like the model citizen to most, but he was also a brutal serial killer who, for years, eluded police without suspicion. But smart police work and DNA from a discarded paper cup proved to be Wardrip's undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Big Chill
programme.desc: When a woman dies after a long illness, investigators have to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide, or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bound for Jail
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in a ravine, police are stuck, as any evidence was washed away by storms. 20 years after the fact, an old hat and a tiny chip of metal put investigators back on the trail of a case long gone cold.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives: The Madison Rutherford Case
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman is found in his rental car. When the victim's wife files a claim for $7 million of life insurance, investigators seek the help of a forensic anthropologist and uncover a chilling scheme of fraud and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Photo Finish
programme.desc: A beautiful model goes missing and no one has a clue to her whereabouts until a park employee discovers photographs in a trash dumpster. With the photos are some vital pieces of information which eventually lead to a professional photographer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Whodunit
programme.desc: An evening out to a murder mystery theatre turns into a real life whodunit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Where the Blood Drops
programme.desc: This is the story of a woman convicted of her husband's murder, whose son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Punch Line
programme.desc: A patient in a hospital emergency room says he cut his hand on a dumpster, but the doctor recognizes the injury as something else. That doctor became the chief witness in a crime involving the murder of a 67-year-old grandmother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: When the Dust Settled
programme.desc: A union official is executed in his home after a strike by union membership, and no one in the neighborhood hears any gunshots.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: Years after a man is hailed for shooting the man who allegedly criminally harassed him and murdered his wife after breaking into their home, new technologies force the police to reassess the case. A tragic tale soon becomes even more tragic in a new way.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sphere of Influence
programme.desc: After a young girl disappears from a small town in a remote area of Alaska, police wonder if she'd been attacked by a bear or become lost in the woods. After her body is discovered with two gunshot wounds they realize the truth is much darker.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed
programme.desc: Just before she's scheduled to testify against her alleged rapist, a woman is murdered on her front lawn. 15 years later, investigators used new technology to finally catch the woman's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A man accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Private Thoughts
programme.desc: An entire family found dead inside their burned-out home appears to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death Play
programme.desc: Marie Robard's character in her high school's play 'Hamlet' hinted at her own inner turmoil.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Dot Com
programme.desc: When a federal agency rules that a fire was intentionally set, the mother of the child killed in the suspicious fire was charged with murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Purr-fect Match
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Rogue Wave Juggernaut

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: A Problem Like Maria

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: End of the Beginning

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Lord Chrisley
programme.desc: When Todd takes his family to the English countryside, he insists on turning the Chrisleys into a proper English family but when the family resists, Todd goes to great lengths to prove he's a royal.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Love and Marriage
programme.desc: When Todd and Julie prepare to make a 'day in the life' anniversary video, the cracks in their marriage begin to show and they scramble to reinvent themselves as the 'perfect' couple.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Sports Day
programme.desc: Every summer the Chrisleys attend a family friend's annual sports day BBQ, and every year they are put to shame. Determined to break their losing streak, Todd's competitive spirit pushes his family to their breaking points.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Hometown Hero
programme.desc: The Chrisleys head to their South Carolina lake house, which also happens to be in the town where Todd grew up. Todd decides the kids are in need of a family history lesson, but the kids end up turning it around on him.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Graduates
programme.desc: Chase and Savannah have just graduated high school, and a celebration is in the works. As spirits run high, Todd plans on surprising Savannah by inviting her boyfriend Blaire. She has decided to take a break from him, however, threatening Todd's plans.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Crowning Achievements
programme.desc: Disappointed that he missed Savannah being crowned Miss Tennessee Teen USA, Todd plans a party to celebrate. Later, tension builds when it becomes clear the party is more for Todd than Savannah.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Wrath of Todd
programme.desc: When Chase asserts his independence by getting a tattoo of a Bible verse, Todd tries everything in his power to entice Chase to remove it. Meanwhile, Savannah is failing her college Bible class.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Todd Unleashed

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Lights, Camera, Chase

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Runaway Faye

programme.title: Movie: Monster-in-Law
programme.desc: Viola Field's fall from grace as a successful television journalist has left her looking for control in her life. When her son announces his engagement to a working-class woman, Viola sets out to ruin her son's marriage before it gets started.

programme.title: Movie: Fifty Shades of Grey
programme.desc: A literature student falls for a wealthy young entrepreneur, who makes clear that any relations between the two of them will be on his own terms. She soon comes to learn of his singular tastes and his need to be completely in control.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Full of Surprises
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's digging into some surprising ingredients. In Santa Fe, N.M., a culinary pub serving up lights-out lamb neck and frying up tamales. In Kansas City, Missouri, a funky tapas joint dishin' out duck tongue tacos and braised pork jowl.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Island Flavor
programme.desc: Guy's in Hawaii for an authentic taste of Oahu. In Waipahu, a family-run business is serving freshly made favorites right out of mom's cookbook.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sausage, Shawarma and Scaloppini
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's travels take him to a unique little Italian restaurant in Wilmington, Del. that serves unbelievable arancini and veal scaloppini. A Middle Eastern street food spot in San Diego features some phenomenal falafel and shawarma.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Places You Sent Me
programme.desc: Viewer recommended spots including In Salt Lake City, a 79-year-old diner serving Mile High biscuits and gravy; in New Orleans, a neighbourhood dive puttin' out roast beef po' boys; in Middletown, Conn., a historic dinner that was rebuilt after a fire.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Global Comes Local
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and his son Hunter cook up some Triple-D style takeout with four chefs over video chat. There's authentic Mexican from Phoenix, kolaches from Salt Lake City, Baltimore pit beef and pork belly all the way from Maui.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: South Beach Sizzle
programme.desc: Guy hits spots in South Beach, Florida like a taqueria and a German restaurant.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Diners You Sent Me To
programme.desc: Guy Fieri heads for three great diners that viewers recommended to him.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Gettin' Fresh
programme.desc: In Boulder, Colo., a college town favourite since the 1920s is flipping grass-fed beef burgers. And, in Chicago, a family-run restaurant puts a twist on biscuits and gravy - with free-range duck.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Carnivore Delivery
programme.desc: Guy and Hunter Fieri are cooking up recipes sent by DDD alums who join in the fun via video chat. On this menu, there are monster beef ribs from Las Vegas, a waffle-hamburger mashup from Atlanta and pizza and wings from San Antonio.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Vikings to Wings
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is digging into Scandinavian, Persian and an Asian spin on wings. A vintage food truck in Portland, rolling out wraps stuffed with Norwegian specialties, and, in Sunrise, Fla., authentic Iranian cuisine like chicken pomegranate stew.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Taste of Asia
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's gettin' a big taste of the Far East. In Las Vegas, the city's original Japanese spot rolls out serious sushi and traditional udon. Then, a Vegas winner is dealin' in righteous pork, and see an Asian spin on classic grilled cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A Little Bit of Everywhere
programme.desc: Guy samples international cuisine found across America.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Guy's All-Star Guests
programme.desc: Guy Fieri has a rock-star lineup kickin' it with him in the kitchen. First, in Kansas City, Mo., Chiefs' head coach Andy Reid tackles pigskin at a joint meticulous about their meat.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hometown Haunts
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's takin' a spin through the town favourites. In Chatham, N.J., the real deal Italian joint bakin' up some righteous fried chicken, arancini balls and the decadent sacred swine sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: BBQ and More
programme.desc: Green mesquite smoked classics in Austin; a railroad car turned BBQ shack in California.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Griddles n' Vittles
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's headed west for barbecue and beyond. In Los Angeles, a food court gem grills up homemade chorizo and a Yucatan turkey special. Then, in Las Vegas, Nevada, two funky joints fire up the grill.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Turn Up the Volume
programme.desc: Ina Garten is turning up the volume on flavour, starting with the creamy hummus she pairs with her chunky Israeli vegetable salad.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Spicy
programme.desc: Some like it hot, and some like it spicy, so Ina Garten is making dishes to please both. She starts with an exotic lamb and chickpea curry made with a fragrant mix of spices, and her lobster corn fritters are paired with creamy sriracha sauce.

programme.title: The Kitchen: A Hug on a Plate
programme.desc: We serve up comforting family favourites like Geoffrey Zakarian's beef stroganoff and Katie Lee's vegetable manicotti. Jeff Mauro puts his spin on a takeout favourite with his General Tso's crispy chicken sandwich.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Little Italy Party
programme.desc: With a cuisine that's as varied as its dramatic landscape, the island of Sicily has become very popular for its wide range of interesting foods. Giada De Laurentiis transports her guests to the exotic island with a Sicilian menu.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Family-style Sunday Dinner
programme.desc: In Giada's family, Sundays are set aside for family dinners. For a stress-free, traditional family dinner at home, her menu includes casual but hearty dishes like baby back ribs with spicy peach BBQ sauce and spaghetti with zucchini and squash.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Crazy 8's
programme.desc: Ree Drummond and the kids serve up some awesome eats with just 8 ingredients. There's a colorful clementine sprinkle cake, a creamy and crunchy easy chicken tot pie, cheesy stuffed pasta and a shortcut speedy dumpling soup.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Underappreciated
programme.desc: Ree Drummond shines a spotlight on unsung hero ingredients. Canned foods reveal hidden talents in her Salmon burgers and spam fried rice. Then Ree uses a freezer star in a spinach mushroom quiche, and a baking mix takes the lead in chocolate chip scones.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Recipes by Request
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts are taking requests for easy, new and creative recipes, starting with easy smothered chicken and grilled red curry lamb chops. There's also a perfect chocolate cake with easy chocolate frosting.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Money-Saving Meals
programme.desc: Guy Fieri believes you don't need to break the bank to make delicious food, so he's invited his chef friends to the ranch to cook a frugal meal that's full of flavor. Aarti Sequeira makes a budget-friendly rice and lentil dish called Kichidi.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: The Cheap Cuts
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and his chef friends are all about making dishes with the cheap cuts. Aarti Sequeira makes mangalore buns, Michael Voltaggio steams mussels escabeche, Justin Warner cooks tacos con lengua, and Jonathan Waxman beer-braises a lamb shoulder.

programme.title: Chopped: Champions: Battle 1, Best Of the Best
programme.desc: The five-part tournament kicks off with a stellar group of defending champs, who must first rock a basket that includes pig ears.

programme.title: Chopped: Champions: Battle 2, Fighting Shape
programme.desc: A lively group of returning winners are revved up for more Chopped Champions drama and excitement, but the first basket features deceptively simple sausage and cabbage.

programme.title: Chopped: Champions: Battle 3, Chefs In Control
programme.desc: Four returning champs are ready to give it all they've got, and in the appetizer round, they must endure a hard-to-melt candy and a difficult-to-prep veggie. In the entree round, the champs suffer some surprising execution errors.

programme.title: Chopped: Champions: Battle 4, Kitchen Storm
programme.desc: Geared up for killer cooking and serious drama, a husband and wife are among the returning champs for the fourth round of Chopped Champions. Crab claws and vanilla frosting are two of the surprises in the first basket.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: The Curious Case of Britney B.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Nuts
programme.desc: Max points out to Christine that she quits everything she finds too hard including her relationships, which is why he chose to be her therapist instead of her boyfriend.

programme.title: Roseanne: The Clip Show: All About Rosey
programme.desc: Child versions of Roseanne and Jackie get to see into their future.

programme.title: Roseanne: The Clip Show: All About Rosey
programme.desc: A futuristic version of D.J. discusses his childhood with a medical professional.

programme.title: Roseanne: Rear Window
programme.desc: A geriatric couple with a penchant for nudity has moved in next door. Darlene worries about how close Becky and David have gotten.

programme.title: Roseanne: My Name Is Bev
programme.desc: After being arrested for drinking and driving, Bev announces that she is an alcoholic. Roseanne fears that Bev may be lying to mitigate the repercussions.

programme.title: Roseanne: Bed and Bored
programme.desc: Feigning illness for preferential treatment, Roseanne claims the doctor has ordered a week of bed rest. However, her grand scheme quickly turns stale when she finds herself bedridden and bored. Jackie and Bev come to blows.

programme.title: Roseanne: Sisters
programme.desc: Fred's unhappy that DJ's spending all his spare time at Jackie's house. Becky and Darlene find common ground.

programme.title: Roseanne: Lost Youth
programme.desc: Jackie finds her love life with Fred to be predictable. Mark is jealous of David's academic success and takes it out on his new relationship.

programme.title: Roseanne: Single Married Female
programme.desc: After discovering Jackie cavorting with another man, Dan makes the difficult decision to tell Fred. Ironically, Jackie realizes her wrongdoing in time to catch Fred moving out of the house.

programme.title: Roseanne: Husbands and Wives
programme.desc: Roseanne is up to her usual schemes. First, she cons Darlene out of a portion of her monthly allowance. Then, she plots to reunite Fred and Jackie. There's one glitch - Jackie's not sure she wants Fred back!

programme.title: Roseanne: Happy Trailers
programme.desc: Roseanne and Dan secretly attempt to help Becky and Mark with money after they move into a shabby trailer. A further case for concern is the couple's boozy trailer-park neighbor, Sharon.

programme.title: Roseanne: The Blaming of the Shrew
programme.desc: D.J.'s first date is with a domineering young girl to a school dance, which Jackie suggests reflects Dan and Roseanne's marriage. Meanwhile, Fred and Jackie go to therapy to work out their marital problems.

programme.title: Roseanne: The Birds and the Frozen Bees
programme.desc: When D.J. reveals that he can bring frozen bees back to life, Jackie decides to conduct a few experiments of her own. Also, Darlene realizes that she's never stopped loving David.

programme.title: Roseanne: Couch Potatoes
programme.desc: The Conners become a Nielsen family. Jackie and Fred decide to end their marriage.

programme.title: Roseanne: Sherwood Schwartz: A Loving Tribute
programme.desc: Dan's dream of building a boat leads to an episode full of fantasy and fun - Gilligan's Island style. Additionally, David graduates high school, and Darlene's unhappy about his summer plans.

programme.title: Roseanne: Shower the People You Love With Stuff
programme.desc: As the baby's birth approaches, the Conner family makes plans for the new arrival.

programme.title: Roseanne: Let Them Eat Junk
programme.desc: Roseanne and Jackie fight over parenting issues, and hurtful words are exchanged. Dan spends time with D.J.

programme.title: Roseanne: Roseanne in the Hood
programme.desc: Roseanne wages war against a new restaurant that opens across from the Lunch Box.

programme.title: Tanked!: Nick Carter Wants His Tank That Way
programme.desc: Backstreet Boy and Dancing with The Stars finalist Nick Carter wants an aquarium for his Los Angeles home. A paddle boat theme seems impossible until Wayde finds one in the middle of the desert.

programme.title: Tanked!: Going for the Gold(fish)
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett get into the patriotic spirit when Olympic basketball phenom Paul George gives them a call. He wants two identical fish tanks next to his indoor pond, and he wants it done by the time he gets home from the Olympics in Rio.

programme.title: Tanked!: This Tank Is Ludacris!
programme.desc: Rapper and actor Ludacris is ready to get Tanked! He wants Brett and Wayde to build him a classy and sophisticated aquarium with lots of exotic fish! It's a race against the clock to get Ludacris his new aquarium.

programme.title: Tanked: Sea-lebrity Edition: Built for Champions
programme.desc: ATM builds a tank replica of WWE star Chris Jericho's championship belt with an ode to his List of Jericho. Later, Then, ATM designs a boxing glove-style aquarium that knocks the socks off of boxing champ, Fernando Vergas.

programme.title: Tanked!: 100 Episodes STRONG!
programme.desc: ATM is excited to design a tank for WWE Superstar and tag team champion Titus O'Neil! The guys will need work as a tag team of their town in order to deliver on their promise to build a University of Florida themed Gator tank.

programme.title: Tanked!: Alyssa's Charmed Tank
programme.desc: Actress, activist, and entrepreneur Alyssa Milano takes some time out her busy schedule to ask Wayde and Brett to make a tank for her family.

programme.title: Tanked: Sea-lebrity Edition: Built for Champions
programme.desc: ATM builds a tank replica of WWE star Chris Jericho's championship belt with an ode to his List of Jericho. Later, Then, ATM designs a boxing glove-style aquarium that knocks the socks off of boxing champ, Fernando Vergas.

programme.title: Tanked!: 100 Episodes STRONG!
programme.desc: ATM is excited to design a tank for WWE Superstar and tag team champion Titus O'Neil! The guys will need work as a tag team of their town in order to deliver on their promise to build a University of Florida themed Gator tank.

programme.title: Tanked!: Alyssa's Charmed Tank
programme.desc: Actress, activist, and entrepreneur Alyssa Milano takes some time out her busy schedule to ask Wayde and Brett to make a tank for her family.

programme.title: Tanked!: Tanks N' Roses
programme.desc: Grammy nominated rock star and former Guns N' Roses guitarist, DJ Ashba shows up at ATM and asks Brett and Wayde to build him a creepy skull themed aquarium.

programme.title: Tanked!: Nick Carter Wants His Tank That Way
programme.desc: Backstreet Boy and Dancing with The Stars finalist Nick Carter wants an aquarium for his Los Angeles home. A paddle boat theme seems impossible until Wayde finds one in the middle of the desert.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Four Chicks and Counting
programme.desc: The African penguin colony welcome their newest additions after a successful mating season. Sea otter Mara is introduced to the rest of the raft, and the wild bottlenose dolphin population in Florida is examined.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Ghost Gators
programme.desc: The team is eager to open their new alligator exhibit featuring rare albino gators. Sea otter Gibson is tested for a possible infection, and divers must swim with Taroko the whale shark to get a blood sample.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Expedition Whale Shark
programme.desc: Aquarium staff travel to the remote island of St. Helena to gain footage of whale sharks in their natural habitat during mating season. Spotted ribbontail ray Francis is introduced to her new tank friends, and Cerbie the seal is treated for joint pain.

programme.title: The Zoo: Kangaroo Dave
programme.desc: Dave, a kangaroo suffering from chronic arthritis, tries cryotherapy. A large group of rambunctious gharials are trained to patiently wait for their food. And, a tiny pygmy marmoset gives birth to an even tinier baby.

programme.title: The Zoo: Slow Loris Romance
programme.desc: The slow loris has a tiny window for breeding, so staff anxiously help a potential pair connect. The veterinary team develop ground-breaking techniques to treat the stoic pigeons and an okapi with a limp gets a helping hand.

programme.title: The Zoo: An Elephant's Trust
programme.desc: Trust and experience are put to the test when an elephant requires delicate veterinary treatment from her keepers. Endangered pink pigeons need all the help they can get to produce offspring. Monty the adorable otter needs to visit the dentist.

programme.title: The Zoo: Training Dragons
programme.desc: The squirrel monkeys play hard-to-get with the Children's Zoo's keepers, a pair of Komodo dragons meet for the first time with explosive results and the Inca terns prepare for their first big flight.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: A pregnant African wild dog has the staff anxiously preparing for the big day, zoo director Jim Breheny steps in to help a keeper learn how to handle a golden eagle and a new tree in Jungle World gives the gibbons a new world to explore.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Tiger's Dance
programme.desc: When keepers introduce two tigers as potential mates, the process proves bumpy. A pair of African porcupines arrive at the zoo, requiring delicate handling. And a pregnancy check on a 3,000 pound rhino necessitates some highly specialized equipment.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Gorilla with Heart
programme.desc: Surgery on a silverback gorilla's broken canine reveals a more serious medical issue. Love may be in the air for two birds of paradise, Glory and Holiday. And, dozens of venomous tarantulas keep the staff on their toes.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Befriending a Beast
programme.desc: After rescuing 30 hybrid wolf-dogs, Tia, Tania, and the twins return to Texas. In the French Quarter, the pandemic has forced Tia to shut down her restaurant, and Toney and Earl band together to deliver meals to the elderly using Tahyo Tavern's resources.

programme.title: Movie: The Single Moms Club
programme.desc: Five single moms from different walks of life are forced together to participate in a fundraiser when their kids are caught spray-painting a wall at school. They decide to form a support group for single mothers to help face everyday challenges.

programme.title: Movie: Obsessed
programme.desc: After getting a promotion, a hard-working businessman, happy with his life, is briefly attracted to a temporary employee assigned to him. He quickly loses interest when she begins to stalk him and his family.

programme.title: Movie: Madea's Big Happy Family
programme.desc: When her three grown-up children fail to answer her call for a family gathering, exacerbated mother Shirley calls on outspoken force of nature Madea to see that everyone comes together to discuss some rather important issues.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's the Oval: A Stranger at Home
programme.desc: Hunter and Victoria confront Jason about his strange behaviors. Lilly makes a decision about how she should proceed with Donald andBobby. Kareem provides Sharon with unexpected information that could help her family.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas: Catch Fade
programme.desc: Fatima comes to Andi's rescue. Sabrina realizes she made a terrible mistake. Zac confronts Karen about why he could never betray her.

programme.title: First Wives Club: One Night Only
programme.desc: Bree and Gary disagree about if they should still get a divorce. Hazel considers going into business with Derek, which erupts into a confrontation between her, Bree and Ari, leading Bree to kick Hazel out of her house and Ari to quit as her lawyer.

programme.title: Bigger: Paint N' Sip
programme.desc: A single woman takes a deeper look at her life.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Buried Pleasure
programme.desc: Holt admits to Cleveland that he wishes he had a special someone in his life. Determined to help his lonely friend, Cleveland introduces Holt to the cat-loving redhead Jill. Meanwhile, Cleveland Jr. and Rallo anticipate the 'birth' of Rallo's pet fish.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: The Curious Case of Jr. Working at The Stool
programme.desc: A feud erupts between father and son when Cleveland Jr. gets a job at Cleveland's preferred bar and begins judging his father's drinking habits. Meanwhile, Roberta competes with the rich girl in school.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Once Upon a Tyne in New York
programme.desc: Cleveland and Donna take a road trip to the Big Apple for an overdue honeymoon, and to Donna's dismay, Cleveland allows the Stoolbend gang to tag along to help Coach McFall rekindle a long lost romance.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Brown Knight
programme.desc: When Cleveland and Donna are mugged at an ATM, Cleveland is accidentally wounded in the tussle. By the time the story hits the local news, the attention goes to Cleveland's head, but Cleveland's version isn't the whole story.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Gone With the Wind
programme.desc: When Cleveland is diagnosed with high cholesterol, Donna puts him on a new high-fibre diet, which causes an intestinal backlash. It may stink up the place, but Cleveland quickly realizes his gas might score him points in the karaoke contest.

programme.title: The Parkers: Squatter's Rights
programme.desc: Nikki is thrilled when Professor Oglevee must move in with her after he goes broke.

programme.title: The Parkers: A Plot With a View
programme.desc: Nikki buys a burial plot for herself and Professor Oglevee from a shady undertaker.

programme.title: The Parkers: Mama, I'm Baaack
programme.desc: Kim surprises everyone when she returns home from Harvard but Nikki has rented her room.

programme.title: The Parkers: The Accidental Therapist
programme.desc: Nikki blackmails Oglevee into attending therapy; T and Stevie snap celebrity photos.

programme.title: The Parkers: The Mack Is Like Wo
programme.desc: The professor lands on a dating game show only to discover that Nikki is a potential date.

programme.title: The Parkers: Kimmie Has Two Moms
programme.desc: Kim and Nikki enter a talk show's best-mother contest, but after they win Nikki falls ill.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Lucky Charms
programme.desc: Philip risks losing a big account when he advises a client to stop listening to Will.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Ethnic Tip
programme.desc: Will complains that no black history is being taught in his school and Vivian takes over.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Young and the Restless
programme.desc: Philip becomes very upset when Will sneaks out with Philip's mother to a rap concert.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: It Had to Be You
programme.desc: Jazz fixes Will up with his sister, Janet, who turns out to be an extremely bossy girl.

programme.title: Martin: Come on Over to My Place
programme.desc: Cole's new girlfriend Shanise forces him to move into his own apartment.

programme.title: Martin: Scrooge
programme.desc: Martin is visited by the Ghosts of Christmas Past, Present and Future.

programme.title: Martin: Waiting, Debating and Ovulating
programme.desc: After Martin promises to spend more time with Gina, he ends up on jury duty with Cole.

programme.title: Martin: Goin' Overboard, Part 1
programme.desc: Everyone goes on a cruise, except Gina who accidentally missed it. Martin meets a beautiful woman named Ellen who he thinks is depressed, and Tommy and Pam try to be friends.

programme.title: Martin: Goin' Overboard, Part 2
programme.desc: While on a cruise, Tommy finds Pam in bed with Cole.

programme.title: Martin: You Play Too Much
programme.desc: Martin helps a burglar rob his apartment because he thinks it's part of a prank by Pam.

programme.title: Movie: A Madea Christmas
programme.desc: Madea gets roped into helping a friend surprise her daughter with a visit to the country over the holidays. Secrets are revealed and relationships are tested as Christmas approaches.

programme.title: Movie: Death Wish
programme.desc: Dr. Kersey is no stranger to holding people's lives in his hands, but after his wife and daughter are brutally attacked during a home invasion he begins taking lives instead of saving them. He becomes a vigilante who hunts the city's worst criminals.

programme.title: Movie: Robin Hood
programme.desc: When his king is killed in battle, Robin, a lowly archer, promises a dying Robin of Locksley that he will return his sword to his father in Nottingham. What Robin and his men find there is more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Movie: Salt
programme.desc: A highly regarded CIA agent, accused of being a Russian spy by a defector, goes on the run to protect her husband. The agent's superiors refuse to believe she's leading a double life until her actions begin to raise doubts.

programme.title: Wynonna Earp: Crazy
programme.desc: It's Trivia Night in Purgatory and that can only mean murder, mayhem and brain sandwiches.

programme.title: Resident Alien: End of the World As We Know It

programme.desc: A single mother moves her family into a house to be closer to specialists for her comatose son. The oldest daughter begins to experience intense nightmares and paranormal attacks. She learns that they now live in the Amityville house, and must escape.

programme.title: Movie: The Host

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Fish Out of Water
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take on a flip in West Covina, CA, a new area for them. They have to expand into new cities to grow their business, but the distance and uncertainty of what buyers there expect lead to disagreements on the scope and design.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Buyer's Remorse
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a smoking deal on a Yorba Linda, CA, home. They spend big money to remove a fireplace, but when Tarek goes behind Christina's back and changes a tile design, she tackles the new fireplace herself.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Flew the Coop
programme.desc: From dirty carpets to rotten food, Tarek and Christina thought they had seen the worst of this house in Cerritos, California. After finding a bird cage with years of mess, they struggle to see past the trash and transform this home into a profitable flip.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Back House Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a small house in Lakewood, CA, to flip quickly. However, when they discover an unpermitted addition, they are faced with a dilemma of bringing the addition up to code or tearing down the nicest part of the house.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Little Sister, Big House
programme.desc: After winning $1 million, Ashley can move out of her rental in Cape Girardeau, Missouri, and buy her first home with her share of the winnings. David Bromstad helps her choose between a renovator's dream and a brand-new build.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: The Sound of Freedom
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners go on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Scratch Offs: Mountain High Dreams
programme.desc: A Florida couple receives an inheritance from a long-lost relative that leaves them $900,000 richer. They struggle to agree on a budget for a mountain vacation home in Blue Ridge, GA, so David Bromstad steps in to help them find something they both love.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Sparkle in the Sunshine State
programme.desc: After winning a million dollars, a couple seeks a home in Jupiter, FL, which is renowned for the lifestyle it offers to the rich and famous. Florida's booming population and low stock challenge David Bromstad to find a glamorous home at the right price.

programme.title: Everything But the House: Retirement Riches
programme.desc: A woman wants to retire in Aruba, so she, her son and his girlfriend join forces with Lara Spencer and her team of appraisers to find valuable collectibles to auction off and turn into cash for the move. Plus, her son plans a very special surprise find.

programme.title: Everything But the House: An Auction With a Cause
programme.desc: A couple needs help raising money for their food pantry, and they hope to sell everything in his grandfather's former waterfront home. They plan to use their auction profits to help those in need, so Lara and her team work to bring in the big bucks.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Lakeside Bonanza
programme.desc: After deciding to pass the time with a scratcher, a man and his family found themselves $10-million richer.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Lucky Lakeside
programme.desc: After winning in the powerball, a Connecticut couple wants a summer lake home where they make memories with their kids. David hunts for the perfect haven on the lakes of East Haddam and guides the couple through lake house ups and downs.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Follow Me to Tennessee
programme.desc: A couple wins a million dollars, but instead of buying their own dream home, they want to buy one for their son that they can live in, too.

programme.desc: A busy family get the opportunity to buy their dream vacation home in Gulf Shores, Alabama after they win one million dollars in a Louisiana Powerball.

programme.desc: After years of travelling, a bachelor is ready to buy a home where his family has lived for five generations. Ben and Erin find a cottage with good resale potential, and their design includes a stunning master bedroom and a quaint front porch.

programme.title: Home Town: The Sky's the Limit
programme.desc: A man who has always moved around and loves to travel and meet new people is looking for a large home. Ben and Erin can't believe their luck when he gives them a limitless budget to design a gorgeous retreat with a Spanish-style kitchen and master suite.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Raise the Kids, Ignore the House
programme.desc: A couple has put their all into raising their two teen boys, but they have neglected to give their aging house the love it needed. Drew and Jonathan step in and overhaul the tired living room, kitchen and dining room.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Change the House, Not the School

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home: Changing It Up for Teenagers
